test.prompt: Run the project's pytest test suite and report any failures with their stack traces. Do not commit until all tests pass.

lint.description: Run ruff check + format check + mypy
lint.prompt: Run `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .`, and `mypy src/pesentinel/protection` and report remaining issues. Do not fix unrelated pre-existing issues.

selfscan.prompt: Run `pesentinel --selfscan` and report findings. This is a Stage 6 feature; if not yet implemented, report that.
